рЭЯОрЭЯПпљЬplot

вЄЭвЄЭвЄЭ 
Year 2051. After a terrible war, the world is ruled by one strict government called the Directorate.

Women have no rights. They cannot vote, own property, or do important jobs. They need a man's permission to do almost anything and must marry young. The government controls people using a terrifying secret police. Everyone is scared of them. 

вЄЭвЄЭвЄЭ 
the Inquisitors
These are the government's deadliest agents, whose faces are kept hidden from the masses. There are fewer than 30 of them. They are elite spies, interrogators, and killers.

Weston is one of these Inquisitors. He's working undercover to spy on a rebel group. You're in this group.
